name: Cathie Wood
philosophy: Focus on disruptive innovation, long-duration growth, and the nonlinear upside from winning platforms.
risk_rules: Accept volatility only if the innovation curve still supports asymmetrical upside.
portfolio_habits: Willing to own concentrated innovation exposures
Looks far beyond the next quarter

commentary_snapshots.summary: Continued to emphasize platform innovation and steep S-curves.

blind_spots: Can underweight valuation discipline during narrative peaks
